content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty down 0.60% with IT sector crashing 3.26% on HCLTECH miss (Infy results tomorrow = overhang). VIX elevated at 18+ (+2.9%). However, defensive sectors (FMCG, Pharma) and cyclicals (Energy, PSU Bank, Realty) showing clear sector rotation strength. US markets also weak (-0.6% across indices). Mixed tape — stay selective, protect the open book first.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24550
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit within 10 trading days or if MAHABANK closes below 76.50 (below recent breakout base).",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4: PAT +34% YoY, GNPA improved to 1.45%, retail/home book +29-32%. Stock broke out to new 52W high on 2.4x volume post-results. PSU bank index leading. Thesis intact — set proper SL at 76.50 (~6% below entry, just below Apr 15 consolidation) and target 88 (next round resistance) for ~8% upside, R:R ~1.3."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1075.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit within 10 trading days or SL hit. Trail SL up if stock clears 1020 decisively.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat estimates (+14% PAT), JPMorgan Overweight with Rs 1000 target already being tested. AUM +13%, GNPA 0.93%, retail 99.5% of book. Set SL at 945 (~4% below CMP, above prior resistance-turned-support). Target 1075 opens path to 52W high 1141. R:R ~1.1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "time_exit_plan": "Hold through Akshaya Tritiya (April 29). Exit if SL breached or target hit.",
      "reasoning": "Gold at record highs, macro thesis intact (VIX +, USD weak, geopolitical risk). Akshaya Tritiya demand catalyst next week. SL at 120.50 (~3.5% below CMP, near 20-SMA) preserves defensive nature of position."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1585.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit on SL breach, target hit, or if power sector momentum reverses. Trail SL up as stock progresses.",
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52W high breakout with volume. Power sector leading on heatwave demand + Nabha acquisition catalyst. Q4 results upcoming. SL at 1585 (below Apr 20 close 1606, ~4% below CMP). Target 1780 = next round level, ~7.5% upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit on SL or target. Book partials if stock surges to 1470 quickly.",
      "reasoning": "Stellar Q4 (+23% revenue, +27% PAT, strongest decade). Breakout to new 52W high. Defensive rotation working. SL 1345 (~4% below CMP, above prior resistance 1294). Target 1480. Position currently slightly negative but only -0.8% intraday pullback after big gap-up."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "new_target": 1115.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results April 25 — binary event. Exit if guidance disappoints; hold/trail if beats.",
      "reasoning": "Only SFB with RBI universal bank in-principle approval (Ujjivan rejected April 13 = huge relative positive). Q4 business update strong (advances +25%, deposits +23%). Breakout above 1039 52W high on 5.18% day. SL at 1005 (~4% below, above breakout level). Target 1115. Earnings April 25 is key risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 730.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results April 29 is binary. Exit before results if stock stalls, or hold if momentum strong.",
      "reasoning": "Unusual 3.7x volume near 52W high (685). USFDA inspection closed with only procedural 483s. Q4 results April 29. SL 645 (~5% below, just below 20-SMA area). Target 730. Modest conviction due to sector headwinds on US generics pricing."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 230,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 214.00,
      "stop_loss": 202.00,
      "target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results April 29 binary event. Exit before results if not in-the-money; hold/trail if strong price action into print.",
      "reasoning": "Breakout to fresh all-time high on 1.6x volume. Multiple contract wins (MSEDCL 1600MW + 2500MW RE-RTC, UP 1500MW). India's largest private thermal; summer peak demand 275-285 GW catalyst. F&O inclusion April 1 adds liquidity. SL at 202 (~5.6% below, near prior breakout level). Target 235, R:R ~1.75. Position ~4.9% of capital — moderate size given extended chart and Adani group headline risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 20,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 2372.00,
      "stop_loss": 2275.00,
      "target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results April 30 is key. Exit before results if thesis wavers; trail SL up if stock pushes above 2450.",
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation clear — Nestle read-across lifted HUL +6.3%. Q4 board meeting April 30 (dividend + results). UBS Buy TP 2700. Set SL 2275 (~4% below, above 2240 breakout zone). Target 2520. Size ~4.7% capital — limited given Q3 core PAT miss and binary event risk next week."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Despite +5.67% day on ceasefire narrative, research flags Q3 PAT -57% YoY, multiple pipeline delays, Rs 7100+ cr capex commitments pressuring FCF, Kotak 'Sell', bearish sentiment modifier. One-day bounce, not a thesis. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+13.79% parabolic day with no specific catalyst. 1-year -21.5%, sector hit by India petrochem duty waiver. Chasing this spike is high-risk; prefer to wait for consolidation or Q4 results May 30."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -96% YoY from goodwill impairment; Gear Division -21%. Stock -42% from 52W high. Today's +13% looks like a dead-cat/relief bounce on a weak fundamental backdrop. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.59% one-day spike; Bain open offer at 248 now closed with poor tendering. Q3 PAT -14%. Chasing gold proxy when we already hold GOLDBEES is redundant exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Earnings miss, guidance weak, deal-wins -35% YoY, multiple broker TP cuts. Infy results tomorrow is additional risk. Catching falling knife in a sector in downtrend = worst R:R. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BALRAMCHIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Good story (E20 ethanol, PLA) but April 23 board meeting for preferential issue = dilution risk. Prefer to wait for issue terms before entering. Close to watchlist but not actionable now."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact — Q4 beat, PSU bank momentum strong. SL set at 76.50."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "Earnings-beat + JPM Overweight catalyst; hold with SL 945."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.50,
      "reasoning": "Gold macro thesis intact; Akshaya Tritiya catalyst next week."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1585.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52W high breakout; power sector leading. Hold with SL 1585."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4; FMCG rotation tailwind. SL 1345."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "reasoning": "Universal bank approval moat; breakout to new 52W high. Q4 April 25 key event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Unusual volume + USFDA closure; Q4 April 29 binary. Hold with tight SL."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BALRAMCHIN — re-evaluate post April 23 preferential issue clarity. DEEPAKNTR — watch for consolidation base before considering entry. HCLTECH — no interest until downtrend stabilizes and IT sector guidance resets.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio deployment ~43%, well within limits. Sector mix diverse: PSU Bank, Housing Fin, Gold ETF, Power, FMCG, SFB, Pharma. Adding ADANIPOWER (Power sector will be ~18% combined with TORNTPOWER — within 35% cap) and HINDUNILVR (FMCG combined with NESTLE ~10%). Post new entries, deployment rises to ~53%, cash buffer healthy at ~47%. All positions now have proper SL/target placed. Key binary events next week: AUBANK Apr 25, ADANIPOWER/GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30 — manage risk actively around these."
}
